_notes: Source: lastepochtools.com i18n en.json key Item_Names.Item_BaseType_Name_<id> fetched from itemDB.affixList.singleAffixes + /data/version142/i18n/full/en.json. Codes 11 and 24 appear in canRollOn of broad weapon/damage affixes (e.g. affixId 2,5,6,12) but have no entry in equippable items nor i18n names — treated as reserved/legacy slot codes. Codes 34-40 exist as BaseTypes (Blessing, Lenses) and 40 is absent; none of them appear in any affix canRollOn list. Code 41 = Idol Altar (Weaver refracted slot affixes, e.g. affixIds 1088/1089/1092). Names match src/Data/Bases/bases_1_4.json 'type' field verbatim for all equipment/idol base types.
